api_key.description: Finnhub API key. Sent only as the X-Finnhub-Token header; never logged.

base_url.description: Finnhub API base URL override for tests or proxies.

exchange.description: Exchange code for the stock_symbols stream (default US).

market_news_category.description: News category for the market_news stream (default general).

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
